summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SilkRoute v2.1 with new simulation widget and transitaires management. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with simulation widget, transitaire integration, and fixed language toggle. All new features working as expected.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Admin login with admin@silkroute.com (JWT token generated)
Member login with test@silkroute.com (JWT token generated)
User registration with new test user (200 OK)
GET /api/groupages returns groupages list (200 OK)
GET /api/groupages/{id} returns single groupage details (200 OK)
GET /api/groupages/{id}/pricing?quantity=10 returns correct price comparison with 28,675 FCFA savings (200 OK)
GET /api/categories returns 4 categories (200 OK)
GET /api/buyer-profiles returns 3 buyer profiles (200 OK)
POST /api/proposals creates product proposal with auth (200 OK)
GET /api/groupages/{id}/documents requires auth (401 without token, 403 for non-members)
GET /api/transitaires returns 5 transitaires from expected cities: Douala (2), Lagos (1), Abidjan (1), Dakar (1) (200 OK)
POST /api/simulate with unit_price_cny=950, unit_weight_kg=0.5, quantity=10 returns comparison with 86,475 FCFA savings > 0 (200 OK)
POST /api/admin/transitaires creates new transitaire (admin only) (200 OK)
POST /api/admin/transitaires forbidden for members (403 Forbidden)
GET /api/admin/stats returns admin statistics (200 OK)
GET /api/admin/warnings returns admin alerts (200 OK)
Unauthorized admin access properly blocked (403 Forbidden)
Invalid login credentials properly rejected (401 Unauthorized)
Landing page loads without Emergent watermark
Language toggle displays 'en' and 'fr' correctly (fixed from previous 'EN-US@POSIX' issue)
Language switching works properly with content translation
Simulation widget visible on landing page with 3 inputs (price CNY, weight kg, quantity)
Simulation widget positioned correctly between savings and groupages sections
Simulation calculation works: 950 CNY, 0.5kg, 10 units → 86,475 FCFA savings
Simulation results display solo price (829,700 FCFA) vs groupage price (743,225 FCFA)
Groupages page displays 3 groupage cards with proper information
Groupage detail page shows transitaire information (AfricaLog Express, Douala, Cameroon)
Transitaire integration working with expected cities from requirements
Supplier verification badges and trade assurance displayed
Navigation tabs (Comparator, Chat, Documents, Members) functional
Pricing calculator shows savings and proper formatting
